name: Perfect Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. If the apples are not tart enough, sprinkle them with 1 tablespoon of lemon juice.
2. Slice the apples thinly.
3. Combine the sugar, flour, spices (cinnamon and nutmeg), and salt with the apples.
4. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry dough.
5. Fill the pastry-lined dish with the apple mixture, dotting it with butter.
6. Adjust the top crust, making sure to cut slits for steam escape.
7. Seal the edges of the crust.
8. Sprinkle sugar over the top.
9. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 50 minutes or until done.
